title: Invitation Request emails and Invitation site lack key info

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have a longstanding issue. A Member in our org requests that a Viewer becomes a Member. As the Admin, I get the email, telling me someone wants to add a user (it does not say member). When I go to the Invitations page, the person being requested does not show up there. This is because the person is already a Viewer. I know this because I filed a ticket with support several months back and identified this as an issue. Basically I have no way of knowing the status or what the request is because email does not say they want the person to become a Member. And the person is also not listed in the Invitations tab in Admin.
It would seem the email notification should say make the person a Member. And the person should be listed somehow in the Invitations tab.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to easily add a new Member without having to click 10+ times, investigate a current User’s status, and save me 30 minutes of time fir each type of request.
